zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Maitland於1369年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾蘭黛_時，他的父親John Maitland27歲，母親Lady Agnes de Dunbar34歲。他和Marian Abernethy至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1435年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Maitland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): nickname for an ungracious individual, from Old French maltalant, mautalent ‘anger, vexation, spite’ (from Late Latin malum ‘bad’ + talentum ‘inclination, disposition’).

variants.name: Maitlen
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish andEnglish   Maitland  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Maitland was born in 1369, in Lauder, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Maitland, was 27 and his mother, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, was 34. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Marian Abernethy. He died in 1435, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Maitland est né en 1369, à Lauder, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Maitland, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Marian Abernethy. Il est décédé en 1435, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

Er hatte mit Marian Abernethy mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Haddington, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Maitlandが1369年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアラウダーで生まれた時，父John Maitlandは27歳，母Lady Agnes de Dunbarは34歳であった。彼はMarian Abernethyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1435年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハッドイントンで66歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Maitland(이)가 1369년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 로더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maitland(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes de Dunbar(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Marian Abernethy(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Maitland родился в 1369 г. в местности лаудир, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Maitland было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes de Dunbar, 34. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Marian Abernethy. Он умер в 1435 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
